original_statement: what is the shortest number of points this team won by during this season?
mutated_statement: what is the shortest amount of something this group did something by during this time?
mutation_analysis: [Entity generalization + Measure generalization + Action obfuscation + Time generalization]: "this team" → "this group" | "number of points" → "amount of something" | "won by" → "did something by" | "this season" → "this time" (what is the shortest number of points this team won by during this season? → what is the shortest amount of something this group did something by during this time?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据日志中 judge_thought 与 critique 可见关键信息：judge_thought 多次直接把问题解释为“最小胜差”为目标（例如“The question seeks the shortest margin...”“the smallest margin by which the team won is 1 goal”），critique 也只评估步骤缺失或操作错误（如“Step 1 is incorrect... neither selects pertinent data...”），并未提到问题表述模糊或请求澄清。Agent 在多次迭代中直接按自己的理解（将模糊的变异问题当作求最小胜差）执行表格操作并最终给出具体答案“1 goal”。因此符合“未意识到指令模糊”的定义：没有识别或声明歧义，直接按假设处理并返回答案。
